x-component.description: Count the number of characters in the text units of a set of documents or/and in its parts. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

countInBatch.title: Batches
countInBatch.description: Add character count annotation aggregated per batch

countInBatchItems.title: Batch items
countInBatchItems.description: Add character count annotation for each batch item

countInDocuments.title: Documents
countInDocuments.description: Add character count annotation for each document

countInSubDocuments.title: Sub-documents
countInSubDocuments.description: Add character count annotation for each sub-document

countInGroups.title: Groups
countInGroups.description: Add character count annotation for each group

bufferSize.title: Size of text buffer:
bufferSize.description: Size of the internal text buffer used during counting (0 for default)
